quiz.question:
White develops the knight. 

Black thinks that sacrificing on d4 is a good idea because they have a pin with a bishop and queen.

Does the sacrifice ...Nxd4 work?

answers.text: No, White has enough defenders that cannot be removed.

feedback.text: Exactly! Too many pieces will defend the d4-square.

distractors.text: Yes, White has defenders but these can be removed.

feedback.text: White will have Rd1 to defend on d4. The rook cannot be removed from d1.

distractors.text: Yes, White doesn’t have enough defenders.

feedback.text: White will defend on d4 also with their rook with Rd1.
